mapper.insert: INSERT INTO disposal (disposal_id, reason, status, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{disposalId}, #{reason}, 'REQUESTED', #{empId}, SYSTIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO disposal_detail (disposal_detail_id, disposal_id, inventory_lot_id, product_id, disposal_qty, reason) VALUES (#{disposalDetailId}, #{disposalId}, #{inventoryLotId}, #{productId}, #{disposalQty}, #{reason})
mapper.update: UPDATE disposal SET status='APPROVED', approved_by=#{approvedBy}, approved_at=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE disposal_id = #{disposalId} AND status = 'REQUESTED'
UPDATE disposal SET status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE disposal_id = #{disposalId} AND status = 'REQUESTED'
mapper.select: SELECT inventory_lot_id as "inventoryLotId", product_id as "productId", current_qty as "currentQty", status as "status" FROM inventory_lot WHERE inventory_lot_id = #{inventoryLotId} AND current_qty > 0 AND status='NORMAL' AND expiry_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE) FOR UPDATE WAIT 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_movement (movement_id, inventory_lot_id, movement_type, source_type, source_id, before_qty, qty, after_qty, created_by, created_at) VALUES ( #{stmvSeq}, #{stockMovement.inventoryLotId}, 'DISPOSAL', 'DISPOSAL_DETAIL', #{disposalDetailId}, #{stockMovement.beforeQty}, #{stockMovement.quantity}, #{stockMovement.afterQty}, #{stockMovement.employeeId}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT disposal_detail_id, disposal_id, inventory_lot_id, product_id, disposal_qty, reason FROM disposal_detail WHERE disposal_id = #{disposalId} ORDER BY disposal_detail_id
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_lot SET status = CASE WHEN current_qty = 0 THEN 'SOLD_OUT' ELSE 'NORMAL' END WHERE inventory_lot_id = #{inventoryLotId}
mapper.select: SELECT il.inventory_lot_id AS "inventoryLotId", il.product_id AS "productId", p.product_code AS "productCode", p.product_name AS "productName", il.lot_no AS "lotNo", il.current_qty AS "currentQty", il.expiry_date AS "expiryDate", il.status AS "status" FROM inventory_lot il JOIN product p ON p.product_id = il.product_id WHERE il.current_qty > 0 AND il.status = 'NORMAL' AND il.expiry_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY il.expiry_date ASC, il.lot_no ASC
